---
name: Add vendor pattern
about: Add a bank statement pattern for a common vendor in your country
title: "[COUNTRY] Vendor: "
labels: enhancement, patterns
assignees: ''
---

**Country:**
<!-- e.g., Malta, Germany, Australia -->

**Bank statement text:**
<!-- Exactly how it appears on your bank statement, e.g., "DEUTSCHE TELEKOM AG" -->

**Vendor:**
<!-- The actual company, e.g., Deutsche Telekom -->

**Correct classification:**
<!-- e.g., "Domestic 19% VAT, overhead/utilities" or "Exempt, exclude" -->

**Notes:**
<!-- Any special treatment, e.g., "Bills from Irish entity for mobile — reverse charge" -->
